pipeline-only.taskCountGuidance: No pack — a single DevPipeline card covers the whole change.
pipeline-only.parallelismGuidance: None — trivial chores run inline, no waves, no agents.

basic.taskCountGuidance: 1 wave, 1-3 tasks — keep a relevant bug or small feature small.
basic.parallelismGuidance: Sequential by default; parallel only if tasks own disjoint paths.

standard.taskCountGuidance: 3-4 waves (W0-W3), a handful of tasks per wave.
standard.parallelismGuidance: Parallelize build-wave tasks across disjoint ownership; one gate per wave.

advanced.taskCountGuidance: 5-7 waves; cross-cutting architecture with several integrations.
advanced.parallelismGuidance: Disjoint-ownership swarms per wave; orchestrator owns shared files and integration.

program.taskCountGuidance: Arbitrary DAG of waves/tasks/gates; multi-week, multi-session.
program.parallelismGuidance: Multiple concurrent waves and runs bounded by capacity; orchestrator integrates.
